description: Karaite betrothal deed. The groom, Ḥayyīm b. Nissīm known as Revaḥ, taking upon himself not to marry another wife for 10 years, except in the event that his wife is still childless after 5 years. The bride, Sukar bt. Aharon ha-Levi , is referenced as previously married (הבעולה).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
